news.headline: PAKISTAN FOREIGN MINISTER TO REUTERS: THERE HAVE BEEN CONTACTS BETWEEN THE OFFICES OF NATIONAL SECURITY ADVISERS OF PAKISTAN AND INDIA

news.summary: In the first quarter of this year, there was a 3% year-over-year decrease in revenue, but there was a 6% year-over-year growth in net revenue. Excluding advocacy, the net revenue growth year-over-year was at 9%. Additionally, there was a significant growth of 15% in digital transformation net revenue excluding advocacy. During this period, there was a net loss attributable to Stagwell Inc. common shareholders amounting to $3 million. However, the adjusted EBITDA for the first quarter stood at $81 million.
news.headline: Stagwell Inc. (NASDAQ: STGW) reports Q1 net loss of $3M, but sees 6% YoY net revenue growth and $81M adjusted EBITDA.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Lausanne, Switzerland, ADC Therapeutics SA, a prominent company specializing in antibody drug conjugates, revealed plans to conduct a conference call and live webcast on May 14, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. The company, listed on NYSE as ADCT, is recognized as a global leader in the field and is at a commercial-stage in its operations. This event serves as an opportunity for stakeholders to engage and learn more about the latest updates and advancements in ADC Therapeutics SA.
news.headline: ADC Therapeutics will host Q1 2025 financial results conference call on May 14, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. NYSE: ADCT.

news.summary: Today, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in New York. The company reported a positive performance and, as a result, has increased its guidance for Portfolio Receipts for the full year 2025. This adjustment indicates a prosperous outlook for the company moving forward.
news.headline: Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) reports Q1 2025 results, raises full year guidance for 2025 Portfolio Receipts.

Echo releases Echo Pure Whole Home Water Filter; removes chlorine, PFAS, lead, fluoride; also filters out bacteria, viruses.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Kirsten Rhodes has been announced as the 2025 Financial Woman of the Year by the Financial Women of San Francisco (FWSF). Rhodes, employed at Deloitte*, holds the position of vice chair of client relationship development and serves as a principal in technology, media, and telecom. Bringing over 30 years of expertise in finance and technology, she plays a vital role in spearheading Deloitte's client relationship strategy aimed at fostering business expansion and achieving success.
news.headline: Kirsten Rhodes of Deloitte named 2025 FWSF Financial Woman of the Year in San Francisco. Over 30 years of experience.

news.summary: In Perth, Scotland, Fintech company Miconex has expanded its digital gifting product into Canada through a partnership with EML Payments. With a proven track record in Europe, Miconex manages over 200 closed loop gift card programs worldwide, facilitating nearly $60 million in local spending. Their successful Downtown Gift Card initiative is currently operational in North America, comprising 42 district branded programs that have generated over $15 million in sales in Canada alone. These local gift cards provide downtown areas with opportunities to benefit from the economic impact of consumer spending.
news.headline: Miconex and EML partner to launch digital gift card tech in Canada, $60M in global spend, $15M sales in Canada.

news.summary: Clothing company HanesBrands Inc. (NYSE: HBI) based in Winston-Salem, N.C., reported its first-quarter 2025 results, with CEO Steve Bratspies noting exceeding expectations in revenue, operating profit, and earnings per share. The company's growth strategy and past transformation initiatives were credited for the positive outcomes. The full-year outlook was reiterated by the CEO. Specific numbers were not disclosed in the provided information.
news.headline: HanesBrands Inc. reports strong first-quarter 2025 results; revenue, profit, and earnings surpass expectations. CEO optimistic about growth strategy.

news.summary: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. (NYSE:PBH) released its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025, from Tarrytown, N.Y. The company highlighted key numbers in its performance during this period without disclosing specifics.
news.headline: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. (NYSE: PBH) reports record fiscal 2025 revenue and earnings; financial results for Q4 and FY 2025.

news.summary: In New York, Melio, a prominent platform for accounts payable and receivable, has formed a partnership with Gusto, a trusted provider of payroll, HR, and benefits for over 400,000 small and mid-sized businesses. This collaboration aims to simplify payment processes for businesses by allowing them to pay employees, contractors, vendors, and receive invoice payments all within a single platform. Gusto joins a expanding group of financial institutions, SaaS providers, and e-commerce platforms that have opted to utilize Melio’s integrated accounts payable and receivable services.
news.headline: Melio teams up with Gusto for bill pay and invoicing, streamlining payments for businesses. Gusto serves 400,000 small to mid-sized companies.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Stratasys Ltd. (Nasdaq: SSYS), a leading company in polymer 3D printing solutions, shared its financial outcomes. CEO Dr. Yoav Zeif mentioned the positive performance, highlighting a net profit on an adjusted basis and favorable cash flow from operating activities. One notable achievement was the 7% sequential increase in recurring revenue from Consumables. This indicates sustained growth in this area for the company.
news.headline: Stratasys reports Q1 2025 financials; CEO highlights 7% growth in recurring revenue Consumables.

news.summary: Outpost24, a prominent cyber risk management and threat intelligence solutions provider, unveiled the addition of two fresh Digital Risk Protection (DRP) modules to its External Attack Surface Management (EASM) platform. The integration of the Social Media and Data Leakage modules complements the existing Leaked Credentials and Dark Web modules, strengthening customer visibility across the complete attack surface. These enhancements offer access to confidential sources and advanced automation, enriching the platform's capabilities for mitigating cyber threats.
news.headline: Outpost24 adds 2 new modules (Social Media, Data Leakage) to EASM platform, joining Leaked Credentials, Dark Web for enhanced cyber risk insights.

news.summary: SharkNinja, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, showcasing significant growth compared to the same period in 2024. The company reported a notable 14.7% rise in net sales, amounting to $1,222.6 million. However, both gross margin and Adjusted Gross Margin experienced a decline of 10 and 60 basis points, respectively. On a positive note, net income saw a spike of 7.5%, reaching $117.8 million. These results demonstrate SharkNinja's strong financial standing and continued success in its market sector.
news.headline: SharkNinja reports Q1 2025 results: 14.7% increase in net sales ($1.2B), 7.5% increase in net income ($117.8M).

news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a prominent player in commercial quantum computing systems, software, and services, recently shared its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, listed as NYSE: QBTS, had a remarkable first quarter according to Dr. Alan Baratz, the CEO. He expressed the quarter as possibly the most momentous in the Company's history, highlighting their exceptional capacity to provide quantum benefits to customers and the scientific realm.
news.headline: D-Wave (NYSE: QBTS) announces Q1 2025 results, CEO Dr. Alan Baratz describes it as significant for the company.

news.summary: Texas-based Oak Creek Homes has been acknowledged for their outstanding achievement in single section home design. The company, situated in League City, has recently received the top honor for Manufactured Home Design - Single Section at the 2025 Excellence in Manufactured Homes Awards. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to excellence in the industry. The award signifies Oak Creek Homes' continued success and dedication to innovative and quality design.
news.headline: Oak Creek Homes wins top award for Single Section Home Design at 2025 Manufactured Housing Awards.

news.summary: Altice USA (NYSE: ATUS) has released its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. According to Dennis Mathew, Altice USA's Chairman and CEO, the company has shown consistent advancement in its operational and financial objectives. In this quarter, Altice USA experienced exceptional customer growth in both its fiber and mobile segments. Additionally, the broadband subscriber performance showed positive momentum compared to the previous quarter. Altice USA also concluded two significant programming negotiations during this period.
news.headline: Altice USA (NYSE: ATUS) reports Q1 2025 results: Record customer growth in fiber and mobile, broadband subscriber performance improves.

news.summary: N-able, Inc., a global software company trading on NYSE under the symbol NABL, announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company's CEO, John Pagliuca, highlighted the ongoing efforts to enhance cyber resiliency globally. Significant achievements in the quarter included the introduction of new security features, a substantial increase in channel partners within the Partner Program, and noteworthy growth in new business acquisitions. According to Pagliuca, these advances contributed to the company's positive earnings and consolidated its position in the cyber-security market.
news.headline: N-able reported Q1 2025 results, showing progress in cyber resiliency with new security capabilities and large partner additions.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Toronto, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) is set to unveil its Fiscal First Quarter 2025 financial results on May 14, 2025. WELL, a digital healthcare company, aims to enhance health outcomes through technology for healthcare professionals and patients worldwide. The company is pleased to announce the upcoming release of its quarterly financial report for the period ending March 31, 2025. Stay tuned for updates on the company's strategic operations and financial performance.
news.headline: WELL Health has record patient visits in Q1 2025. Earnings event set for May 14, 2025. Exciting growth for the company.

news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, Precision BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTIL), a company specializing in gene editing, will release its financial report for the first quarter of 2025 and share a business update on May 15, 2025. Utilizing its ARCUS® platform, Precision BioSciences focuses on developing in vivo gene editing therapies for diseases with significant unmet needs. This clinical stage company aims to enhance life through its innovative gene editing approaches.
news.headline: Precision BioSciences (Nasdaq: DTIL) to report Q1 2025 results on May 15, 2025. Developing in vivo gene editing therapies.
Russia and China sign joint statement on global stability.

news.summary: In a recent press release, it was announced that dunnhumby, a leading global AI customer data science company, and Bridg, an identity resolution and shopper intelligence platform, have formed a strategic partnership. The collaboration aims to provide innovative retail media and loyalty solutions. Leo Nagdas, the Head of Corporate Development at dunnhumby, expressed excitement about the partnership, emphasizing the potential for driving additional customer value. This partnership represents a significant development in the industry, combining the strengths of two prominent companies in the field.
news.headline: dunnhumby and Bridg partner for enhanced customer engagement. Retail media activation boosted for retailers and brands.

news.summary: In Toronto and New York, The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. CEO Tamir Poleg expressed satisfaction with the results, emphasizing their ongoing commitment to innovative practices. The company's focus on technology for real estate agents, home buyers, and sellers contributed to strong growth, marking a successful start to 2025. The positive outcomes reflect Real's dedication to providing distinctive services in the real estate sector.
news.headline: Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) reports strong Q1 2025 results, Chairman Tamir Poleg credits innovative growth strategy.

news.summary: In HERNDON, Va., BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) reported its first quarter results ending March 31, 2025. The company announced winning over $130 million in contract bookings. CEO Brian E. O’Toole expressed excitement over the successful launch of Gen-3, which has sparked substantial demand and bolstered global sales pipeline. The first Gen-3 satellite is fully operational and surpassing performance expectations.
news.headline: BlackSky reports Q1 2025 results, with $130 million in contracts and successful Gen-3 satellite launch.

news.summary: Predictmedix AI Inc., a prominent player in AI-driven health and safety solutions, is set to be featured as one of four showcased companies in a specialized European investor roadshow across Budapest, Zagreb, and Belgrade from May 17 to May 21, 2025. The roadshow marks a significant juncture in Predictmedix AI’s expansion journey. The company’s notable stock identifiers include CSE: PMED, OTC: PMEDF, and FRA: 3QP.
news.headline: Predictmedix AI (CSE: PMED) to headline European investor roadshow across Budapest, Zagreb, and Belgrade from May 17-21, 2025.

news.summary: In Tampa, FL, on May 8, 2025, Wellgistics Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: WGRX) revealed a groundbreaking initiative. The company, known for its tech-driven pharmaceutical distribution and healthcare infrastructure services, shared plans to lead the way in leveraging XRP, a blockchain-based digital asset, for treasury reserves and live payments. Wellgistics aims to become one of the initial publicly traded healthcare firms to implement XRP in such a dual capacity. This move signifies a significant shift in the industry towards digital assets and real-time transaction processing.
news.headline: Wellgistics Health secures $50M credit line, launches XRP-powered payment initiative, to be one of first healthcare firms using XRP.
🔴 BoE: MPC considered a range of possibilities for how domestic inflation pressures could evolve and circumstances that could require changing course of policy.

news.summary: In Stockholm, Syncron, a prominent provider of intelligent Service Lifecycle Management solutions, unveiled the Syncron Partner Network. This new program aims to bolster the company's worldwide ecosystem by empowering partners to enhance Syncron's offerings in services, sales, marketing, and product development. Through this initiative, aftermarket operations are set to be transformed for customers on a global scale.
news.headline: Syncron launches Syncron Partner Network to boost global ecosystem, enhancing aftermarket services for worldwide customers.

news.summary: Houston-based energy company ConocoPhillips has revealed that Bill Bullock will be retiring from his position after dedicating 39 years to the company. This marks the end of a long and successful career for Bullock at ConocoPhillips.
news.headline: Bill Bullock retires after 39 years at ConocoPhillips. #Houston #BusinessWire #Retirement

news.summary: Revenue from cloud subscriptions saw a 15% boost from the previous year, reaching a total of nearly $99.8 million. This resulted in an operating cash flow of $45 million.
news.headline: Appian's Q1 2025: Cloud subscriptions revenue up 15% YoY to $99.8M, $45.0M operating cash flow.

news.summary: Alpharetta-based Clearside Biomedical, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSD) revealed that it will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 14, 2025, post the closure of financial markets. The biopharmaceutical firm, known for transforming eye therapy delivery via the suprachoroidal space (SCS®), confirmed there will be no conference call this quarter. This update highlights the company's commitment to transparency and providing timely financial information to its stakeholders and investors.
news.headline: Clearside Biomedical (Nasdaq: CLSD) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 14, 2025 without a conference call.

news.summary: In Alachua, Florida and Tampa, Florida, on May 8, 2025, Axogen, Inc. shared their financial results and business updates for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. As a leading company in creating and promoting innovative surgical remedies for peripheral nerve injuries, Axogen, Inc. (NASDAQ: AXGN) disclosed its performance metrics and key achievements during this period. The report outlined the company's progress and strategies in this field, marking significant developments in their operations and financial standings.
news.headline: Axogen, Inc. announces 2025 Q1 financial results; leader in surgical solutions for nerve injuries.
